description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.6-jdk8-alpine Docker image, sets GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository's .gradle directory in a before_script, and defines the variable GRADLE_OPTS as -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define a single stage named test. Add seven jobs named test:t1 through test:t7, each running in the test stage, each excluding the branch csui-advprog-2018/lab and only triggering on branches matching the regex /.*tutorial[_-].*N$/ where N is the tutorial number (1‑7). Each job executes the shell command "gradle :tutorial-N:check" (replace N with the tutorial number), and the test:t7 job also runs "gradle :tutorial-7:jacocoTestReport". Jobs test:t5, test:t6, and test:t7 publish the contents of /tutorial-N/build/* as artifacts (with N matching the tutorial number).
